creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: danfe
Date: Thu Dec 19 08:53:10 UTC 2019
New revision: 520425
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/520425

Log:
  Update to version 2.3.0, upstream changelog:

    - Support git-crypt
    - Support specifying a command after `yadm enter`
    - Expose GIT_WORK_TREE during `yadm enter`
    - Support GNUPGHOME environment variable
    - Assert private dirs, only when worktree = $HOME

  PR:		242706
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Changes:
  head/sysutils/yadm/Makefile
  head/sysutils/yadm/distinfo
